### Visual extraction  
- **Headings**:  
  - Blue banner: "STANDARD PROCUREMENT DOCUMENT"  
  - Main title: "Request for Proposals Consulting Services"  
  - Red conditional text: "For Projects with Project Concept Notes (PCN) Decision Notes on or before October 1, 2018"  

- **Logos/Branding**:  
  - Bottom left: World Bank logo with "THE WORLD BANK" and "IBRD • IDA" beneath it  

- **Key facts**:  
  - Document type: Standard Procurement Document for Consulting Services RFP  
  - Applicability: Projects with PCN Decision Notes dated on or before October 1, 2018  
  - Issuance date: "December 2019" (bottom right)  

- **Visual details**:  
  - Red text highlights a critical eligibility condition for proposals  
  - No tables, charts, signatures, or checklists visible on this page
